parents.subject: LU-8066 mgs: migrate files out of procfs

commit.subject: LU-19079 nodemap: compute sha256 of nodemap name
commit.message:
LU-19079 nodemap: compute sha256 of nodemap name

Add a new field nm_sha to struct lu_nodemap, to hold sha256 of the
nodemap name. This sha is computed when the struct lu_nodemap is
loaded into memory, and is not stored on disk.

Test-Parameters: trivial testlist=sanity-sec
Signed-off-by: Sebastien Buisson <sbuisson@ddn.com>
